manager.bio: The quintessential veteran manager. Five playoff appearances, the best lineup IQ in the league (89.78%), and a deeply professional approach to dynasty roster management. Never the flashiest — always dangerous. The league's most underrated manager by reputation.

trades.note: Paid up for Mahomes when others hesitated. The pick paid dividends across every season.
Sold Etienne before the injury history caught up, bought Harrison before anyone knew how good he'd be.
Moved a declining slot WR for an ascending RB. Classic RBR — calm, calculated, correct.
Receiver swap for a team in win-now mode. Neither player moved the needle in 2025.

rivalries.description: RBR's biggest wall. Despite superior lineup IQ on paper, MLSchools12's depth has been too much.
RBR has mentored and beaten TDTD19844 across the dynasty. The student hasn't quite surpassed the teacher yet.
Two veteran managers who've swapped playoff spots repeatedly. Dead even across six years.
